title: agentx Provider Platform Schemas
description: Machine-validatable JSON Schema contracts for Volume 04 — Provider Platform. Covers CompletionRequest, CompletionResponse, Provider interface, NormalizedToolSpec, NormalizedToolCall, CredentialResolverConfig, and ProviderCostEntry.

CompletionRequest.description: Canonical request dispatched to a provider adapter for LLM completion.

systemPrompt.description: System-level instructions sent to the LLM.

userPrompt.description: User-level message or task context for the LLM.

context.description: Optional conversation history or contextual messages.

tools.description: Tools available for the LLM to invoke during completion.

maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens for the completion response.

CompletionResponse.description: Normalized response returned from any provider adapter.

text.description: Generated text content from the LLM.

toolCalls.description: Tool invocations requested by the LLM.

providerId.description: Identifier of the provider that served the request.

Provider.description: Provider adapter interface definition — each provider must implement these capabilities.

id.description: Unique provider identifier (e.g. openai, anthropic, ollama).

supportedModels.description: List of model IDs this provider supports.

NormalizedToolSpec.description: Provider-agnostic tool specification forwarded to the LLM.

description.description: Human-readable description of the tool's purpose.

parameters.description: JSON Schema object describing the tool's input parameters.

NormalizedToolCall.description: A tool invocation requested by the LLM, normalized across providers.

toolName.description: Name of the tool to invoke.

arguments.description: Arguments to pass to the tool, matching the tool's parameter schema.

callId.description: Unique call identifier for correlating the tool result back to the LLM.

CredentialResolverConfig.description: Configuration for resolving provider credentials at runtime.

resolutionStrategy.description: How credentials are resolved: environment variable, vault service, inline config, or file path.

envVarName.description: Environment variable name when strategy is env-var.

vaultPath.description: Vault secret path when strategy is vault.

filePath.description: Path to credential file when strategy is file.

ProviderCostEntry.description: Cost tracking entry for provider billing and budget enforcement.
